summary: Crystal shop and healing services website with appointment booking, QR code payment, and a crystal shop section featuring 19 crystals in raw and bracelet forms starting from ₹600.
architectural_notes: Crystal shop section displays products in two forms: raw and bracelet, with pricing starting from ₹600
Payment section uses a QR code image provided by the user - must use exact original image, not a placeholder
known_issues: QR code image in payment section is showing an error / broken image in Version 14

existing_features.title: Add 19 crystal products to the static products data file (frontend/src/data/products.ts). Each crystal must have two entries: one for the raw form and one for the bracelet form. All 19 crystals are: Clear Quartz (The Master Healer), Amethyst (Spirituality & Protection), Rose Quartz (Love & Compassion), Black Tourmaline (Grounding & Protection), Green Aventurine (Luck & Prosperity), Labradorite (Transformation & Magic), Selenite (Cleansing & Clarity), Fluorite (Focus & Clarity), Aquamarine (Calm & Communication), Malachite (Transformation & Heart Chakra), Black Obsidian (Negativity Shield), Carnelian (Creativity & Motivation), Moonstone (Intuition & Feminine Energy), Lapis Lazuli (Wisdom & Truth), Pyrite (Wealth & Energy), Tiger's Eye (Courage & Confidence), Moldavite (Transformation), Blue Lace Agate (Calmness), Garden Quartz (Grounding & Manifestation). Each product's base price must be ₹600 (raw forms) and ₹800 (bracelet forms) before any markup. The description for each must mention the crystal's metaphysical property (e.g., 'The Master Healer'). Product type must be 'crystal' for raw forms and 'bracelet' for bracelet forms. Image paths must reference the corresponding generated product images from frontend/public/assets/generated/.

Replace the broken QR code image in the payment section (Appointment.tsx) with the newly generated correct QR code image saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/qr-code.png. Update the img src to point to this path. The QR code displayed must match the uploaded image exactly (Ishita Singh, UPI ID: 9305831180@pthdfc, Kotak Mahindra bank).

new_feature_requests.summary: Add crystal shop section with 19 crystals (Clear Quartz, Amethyst, Rose Quartz, Black Tourmaline, Green Aventurine, Labradorite, Selenite, Fluorite, Aquamarine, Malachite, Black Obsidian, Carnelian, Moonstone, Lapis Lazuli, Pyrite, Tiger's Eye, Moldavite, Blue Lace Agate, Garden Quartz) displayed in raw and bracelet forms, each starting from ₹600
Fix QR code image in payment section - replace broken/error QR code with the correct original QR code image provided by user
